name: Scary World Tingz The Unexplainable Vol.1
overview: Sent from the planet Axinia at 3 months old, S.W.T. is raised by Khoisan ancestors who protect the secret of his blood. Guided by visions of his mother, he must master his celestial powers to defend Earth from a rising ancient evil.

trailers.title: Scary World Tingz The Unexplainable Final Teaser  2026
